summary: Defines Source interface and SourceMessage type - the common abstraction for all content sources
notes: Core abstraction for the source package. Source interface defines: Type() string, Name() string, FetchMessages(ctx context.Context, checkpoint string, limit int) ([]SourceMessage, string, error). SourceMessage is the canonical data model with ExternalID, Text, Title, URL, Author, Timestamp. All source implementations (rss, hackernews, reddit, telegram) follow this contract.
